item.title: Google opens AI centre as Berlin defends US tech reliance
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
German Chancellor Friedrich Merz's coalition has signalled it wants to make progress on the AI front as part of efforts to revive the struggling economy.
Matched: policy(+3), budget(+3), law(+3), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3), funding(+2), who(+2)

Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)
WASHINGTON, March 6 — A US judge will meet behind closed doors with government lawyers on Friday seeking to hammer...
Matched: policy(+3), law(+3), court(+2), war(+3), election(+2), ai(+3), funding(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Most Asian equities drop as Mideast crisis rages, though oil dips
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Investors are wondering when the US-Israel war on Iran and Tehran's attacks across the Gulf region will end.
Matched: war(+3), ceasefire(+3), sanctions(+2), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: US stock futures steady as investors weigh Middle East war fallout
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
A prolonged disruption in shipping through the strategic Strait of Hormuz is likely to further fuel inflation pressures through energy and shipping costs.
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3)

item.title: Global aviation under strain as Middle East flight cancellations top 23,000
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Of the 36,000 scheduled flights to or from the Middle East since Feb 28, more than half have been cancelled, according to analytics.
Matched: budget(+3), ministry(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: BNM keeps OPR at 2.75pc as supportive stance holds amid volatile global conditions, say economists

item.title: Malaysia’s economic exposure to Mideast conflict minimal, says Sim
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
The deputy minister says trade with Iran accounts for just 0.09% of Malaysia's overall trade, reaching RM2.45 billion last year.
Matched: court(+2), war(+3), sanctions(+2), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Trump hit with new tariff lawsuit as US states accuse him of illegal ‘end run’ around Supreme Court ruling

Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)
WASHINGTON, March 6 — A group of 24 US states sued President Donald Trump’s administration on Thursday in th...

item.title: Pentagon formally designates Anthropic as supply-chain risk
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
It is the first time a US company has received the 'supply-chain risk' designation, previously reserved for firms from adversary countries such as China’s Huawei.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Wall Street closes down as oil prices spike on Middle East conflict
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
US oil rises 8% to highest since July 2024 amid Middle East conflict, stoking inflation concerns.
Matched: war(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3)

Source: FMT Business (Finance)

item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Officials are now taking a more cautious stance as geopolitical risks intensify.

item.title: Gulf carriers resume limited flights, but missile fire fuels uncertainty
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Flights remain limited and uncertain with a chartered Air France flight from the UAE turning back due to missile fire, and Dubai airport operating at about 25% capacity.

item.title: Record high RM426.7bil approved investments in 2025
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim says this is an 11% increase from the approved investments recorded in 2024.
